svg.title: Tick cycle and rebalance flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full tick loop from position discovery through strategy evaluation, execution gate, write-ahead task intent, close leg, JIT re-evaluation, and open leg.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when an orchestrator ticks?')
sendPrompt('How does the ExecutionGate resolve conflicts?')
sendPrompt('What is the write-ahead intent and why does it matter?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the close transaction is sent?')
sendPrompt('What is the JIT re-evaluation and when does it trigger?')
sendPrompt('What does the open transaction do?')
